name: DeepSeek-OCR-Dashboard
description: An out-of-the-box local Web UI for DeepSeek-OCR. Built with FastAPI + Vue.js, it supports PDF/Image uploads, progress tracking, and result   visualization with bounding boxes. Easily experience the power of a top-tier OCR model.

commit.message: Refactor code structure for improved readability and maintainability
feat: add showcase section to README and README_zh for better visibility
feat: update README and replace demo showcase GIF for improved presentation
Refactor code structure for improved readability and maintainability
feat: update UI components and improve layout for better user experience
feat: enhance workspace layout and sidebar functionality with responsive design

feat: add new components for DeepSeek-OCR interface

- Implement ActionCard.vue for inference control with progress tracking.
- Create HeroSection.vue to display service status and metrics.
- Add HistoryCard.vue for displaying cached inference results.
- Introduce LayoutDetailsCard.vue for viewing annotation details.
- Develop LogCard.vue to show inference logs.
- Implement MetaCard.vue for displaying inference details.
- Create ModeCard.vue for selecting inference modes.
- Add OutputCard.vue for showing structured inference output.
- Introduce PageTextCard.vue for displaying recognized text on the current page.
- Develop PromptCard.vue for configuring input prompts.
- Implement UploadCard.vue for handling file uploads.
- Create VisualPreviewCard.vue for visualizing inference results.
- Add WorkflowStepsCard.vue to display the workflow steps.
feat: add history management for OCR results with caching and retrieval functionality
Refactor code structure for improved readability and maintainability

feat: enhance image and PDF upload functionality with layout visualization and progress tracking

- Added support for PDF uploads, allowing users to upload and process PDF documents.
- Implemented layout visualization for images and PDFs, enabling users to view annotations and extracted text.
- Introduced progress tracking during inference tasks, displaying real-time updates on the processing stage.
- Enhanced user interface with new components for previewing images, managing layout regions, and displaying progress.
- Refactored code to improve state management and responsiveness of the application.

feat: initialize frontend project with Vue 3 and Vite

- Add base CSS for color palette and layout styles.
- Include logo SVG for branding.
- Create main CSS file to import base styles and set app layout.
- Implement HelloWorld component with props for dynamic message.
- Develop TheWelcome component with multiple WelcomeItem subcomponents for project guidance.
- Create WelcomeItem component for reusable welcome sections.
- Add various icon components for documentation, tooling, ecosystem, community, and support.
- Set up main entry point for Vue application.
- Configure Vite for Vue development with aliasing and build output settings.
- Add start script for backend server initialization in production.

readme_html:
DeepSeek-OCR Web Playground 🚀🖼️

English | 中文

FastAPI + Vite/Vue wrapper around the DeepSeek-OCR model for quick local testing. 🎯

Showcase:

Showcase: Mathematical Formula Recognition

Showcase: Table Data Processing

Features ✨

  • 📄 PDF & 🖼️ image upload, with automatic PDF page splitting.
  • ⏳ Progress visualization during uploads/inference so you know it’s working.
  • 🗺️ Bounding-box overlay for layout/annotation visualization.
  • 📑 Annotation detail view for extracted labels/regions.
  • 📜 History management: View and manage past OCR results.
  • 🧩 Modular UI: Specialized components for Upload, Prompt, Mode, and Actions.
  • 📊 Enhanced Visualization: Visual preview, layout details, and page text inspection.
  • 📝 Logs & Workflow: Real-time logs and workflow step tracking.

Screenshots:

  • Overlay view:
  • Annotation details:

Tested environment 🧪

  • Conda env: ds-ocr
  • Python 3.10.19 (conda-forge)
  • PyTorch 2.6.0+cu118 (CUDA)
  • GPU: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3090

Quick start (conda) ⚡

# 1) create / activate
conda create -n ds-ocr python=3.10 -y
conda activate ds-ocr

# 2) backend deps (install torch CUDA build first if needed)
cd web_project/backend
pip install --upgrade pip
# offline / matching CUDA build:
# pip install --no-index --find-links ../../wheels torch torchvision
pip install -r requirements.txt

# 3) frontend deps
cd ../frontend
npm install

# 4) run dev (from repo root)
cd ../../
./start.sh

./start.sh starts FastAPI on localhost:8000 and Vite dev server on localhost:5173. 🌐

Run separately 🧭

# backend
cd web_project/backend
uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

# frontend
cd web_project/frontend
npm run dev

Key env vars 🛠️

  • OCR_BACKEND_PORT: backend port (default 8000)
  • DEEPSEEK_OCR_MODEL_PATH: model weights path override (default ocr_project/model)
  • DEEPSEEK_ATTN_IMPL: attention impl, e.g. flash_attention_2
  • DEEPSEEK_ALLOWED_ORIGINS: CORS allowlist, comma-separated
  • DEEPSEEK_MAX_IMAGE_MB: upload size limit in MB (default 15)
